name: I Will Knock You
original_name: พี่จะตีนะเนย
overview: Thi just wanted to tutor in peace. Instead, he angers a retro-styled gang leader and ends up face to face with Noey again—as his new student.

trailers.title: I Will Knock You | Official Trailer | Will the stubborn or persistent boy get love struck first?
Teaser พี่จะตีนะเนย I will knock you
